content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6

## Summary

Thorough review of the planned-elsewhere reconciliation implementation. The code is well-structured with clear separation of concerns: panel_contracts.rs defines the schema, final_review.rs handles amendment classification and consensus, engine.rs partitions amendments and records mappings, planned_elsewhere.rs handles verification and commenting, and success_reconciliation.rs ties it together post-run. Key design strengths: (1) conservative merge strategy for conflicting mapped_to_bead_id across reviewers, (2) three-phase verify→persist→comment approach that prevents duplicate comments on replay, (3) journal-as-source-of-truth with NDJSON sidecar as write-through projection, (4) reconstruct_missing_pe_mappings covers failure window between stage commit and mapping recording, (5) transient vs definitive error distinction in bead verification prevents false stale-bead downgrades. Tests cover all acceptance criteria: successful mapping, stale bead fallback, journal recording, persistence across reload, transient error propagation, closed-bead-is-stale, comment posting/skipping, and round-trip serialization. All tests pass. No bugs or safety issues found.

## Amendments

None.
